name: Greengrass
description: Contains details for a gateway that runs on IoT Greengrass. To create a gateway that runs on IoT Greengrass, you must add the IoT SiteWise connector to a Greengrass group and deploy it. Your Greengrass group must also have permissions to upload data to IoT SiteWise. For more information, see Ingesting data using a gateway in the IoT SiteWise User Guide.

allOf.description: The ARN of the Greengrass group. For more information about how to find a group's ARN, see ListGroups and GetGroup in the IoT Greengrass API Reference.
